description_long: This awning structure features a robust fixed frame made of light-colored wood beams and posts, supporting a partially open roof with visible rafters. The main enclosure is constructed from red brick walls, with large glass windows and double glass doors framed in wood on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light to enter. The roof is flat and unfinished, with exposed wooden joists running parallel across the top, suggesting either an under-construction state or a pergola-style awning. The brickwork is uniform and clean, with two perpendicular walls at the rear providing structural support. The glass panels are clear and expansive, maximizing visibility and openness. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use as a sunroom, patio cover, or sheltered outdoor extension in an urban environment.
description: A modern, fixed-frame wooden and brick awning with large glass windows and doors, featuring an open-beam roof structure. The design is clean and functional, ideal for urban patios or sunrooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass doors and large windows framed in wood, with the open-beam roof visible above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open wooden rafters and extensive glass paneling along the length of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid brick walls and the flat, unfinished roof with wooden beams barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick wall, open roof beams, and a single large window at the end.
attribute_mounting_location: attached to the exterior wall of a building, extending outward as a covered patio or sunroom
attribute_canopy_pattern: solid light wood with exposed beams, no fabric or decorative pattern
attribute_edge_trim_style: straight, unfinished wooden edges with no decorative trim
attribute_support_structure_type: fixed frame with posts and beams anchored to brick walls
